name: S-12 merge exits two when the supplied --operator path does not exist on disk
command: printf -- '[]' > catalog.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/merge-registry.sh" --catalog catalog.yaml --operator missing.yaml --emit m.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'not found' err.txt && echo rejected 1>&2
